scripts.build:wasm: cd packages/formula-engine && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg --release && wasm-pack build --target nodejs --out-dir pkg-node --release
scripts.build:wasm:dev: cd packages/formula-engine && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir pkg --dev && wasm-pack build --target nodejs --out-dir pkg-node --dev
scripts.dev: docker compose up -d postgres redis && pnpm run build:wasm:dev && pnpm --filter @cellix/backend db:migrate && pnpm run dev:start
scripts.prod: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('.env.prod')) { console.error('.env.prod not found. Create it from .env.prod.example first.'); process.exit(1); }" && docker compose -f docker-compose.prod.yml --env-file .env.prod up -d --build
